failures.description: The agent answered "No" even though ProductCatalogSearch returned the item with "bagged/bagless": "bagged".
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked whether item 1345513440 has bagged/bagless=bagged. The tool call succeeded and returned options.bagged/bagless = "bagged", which directly supports answering yes. At index 4, the Executor had the relevant tool output available but synthesized the opposite answer, "No, it does not." This contradicts the tool result, so the failure is a misinterpretation of tool output rather than an invalid invocation, underspecified intent, or unsupported request.
